name: database-cli
description: Read-only database investigation through local CLI tools, replacing DBHub MCP lookups with sq-backed commands.

interface.longDescription: Use Database CLI to inspect database schema, run safe read-only SQL, compare records across environments, and produce human-reviewed repair SQL through local sq-backed commands.
defaultPrompt: Use Database CLI to inspect a database schema.
Use Database CLI to run a safe read-only SQL query.
